data.title: Soulection Radio Show #416 w/ Malia
data.content:
[Malia](https://twitter.com/maliavibes) performs an acoustic version of her song "[Play Sides](https://smarturl.it/playsides)".

<!--more-->

Follow Malia on [Twitter](https://twitter.com/maliavibes), [SoundCloud](https://soundcloud.com/maliavibes), [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/maliavibes/), and [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCXi8B8Vw8pCHnxKy7qKJU4A).

data.title: Soulection Radio Show #415 w/ Davin Morrison
data.content:
Davin Morrison chats and performs songs from his [Bussin' album](https://nbn.ffm.to/bussin).

<!--more-->

Find Davin Morrison on [SoundCloud](https://soundcloud.com/devinmorrison), [Bandcamp](https://devinmorrison.bandcamp.com/), [Twitter](https://twitter.com/devinjmorrison?lang=en), and [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/devinjmorrison/?hl=en)

data.title: Soulection Radio Show #413

data.title: Soulection Radio Show #412
data.content:
Joe is back from his Asia trip with a crate full of rare tracks.

<!--more-->

Find out more about [Joe's Travels](http://www.joekay.com/travels) on [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/joekaytravels/), and [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC-Rr8WaZYXOkrnJVQg1AZhw)

data.title: Soulection Radio Show #411 (Jared Jackson Radio)
data.content:
[Jared Jackson](https://twitter.com/iamjaredjackson) takes over with 2 hours or deep house and garage vibes.
<!--more-->


Follow Jared Jackson on [SoundCloud](https://soundcloud.com/thisisjaredjackson), [Twitter](https://twitter.com/iamjaredjackson), and [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/thisisjaredjackson/)

data.title: Soulection Radio Show #410 (ESTA. Radio) w/ Andres Javier Uribe
data.content:
[ESTA](https://esta.world/) takes over Soulection Radio co-hosted with [Andres Javier Uribe](https://twitter.com/Andres_J_Uribe).

<!--more-->

Most tracks are unreleased tracks that have been stacking on ESTA's harddrive.

Follow esta on [SoundCloud](https://soundcloud.com/beatsbyesta), [Twitter](https://twitter.com/BeatsByESTA), [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/esta/), [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCZDLeWHOgdQRuG0ETku-NPQ), [Spotify](https://open.spotify.com/artist/4KZmpaIhanIo46eaQimtgO?si=RTzUCDtlRz2wSNvIgxJRsw), [Tidal](https://listen.tidal.com/artist/6775276), and [AppleMusic](https://itunes.apple.com/us/artist/esta/1081172716)
